summary: After successfully clearing a hidden dungeon, the protagonist claims a powerful spider-themed mask and feeds rare crystals to his pet, Tangy, granting the creature new fire and ice abilities. Meanwhile, the protagonist is overwhelmed by sponsorship offers following his broadcast performance and prepares for a professional conflict with Jung Hanbaek, who is reeling from his televised humiliation. Inspired by his pet, the protagonist decides to create engaging new content by hiring famous streamers to provide combat lessons to his audience.
key_moments: The protagonist obtains the Crastle's Curse mask and upgrades his pet, Tangy, with elemental crystals.
Jung Hanbaek faces intense backlash and loss of reputation after losing a variety show fight to the protagonist.
The protagonist signs lucrative sponsorship deals and formulates a plan to boost his popularity by creating educational combat content.
